rows.label: qev040402_MSG0001
rows.name:
*Zzz* *Zzz* *Zzz* *Zzz* Being
a popular guy is tough-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0002
rows.name:
Don't push-mo, don't push-mo!
Satsu only has one body-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0003
rows.name:
I've had enough of girls
already-mo. Someone save me-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_JNK0010
rows.name: Wake

rows.label: qev040402_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell him that his brothers are worried.

rows.label: qev040402_JNK0020
rows.name: Do Not Wake

rows.label: qev040402_SEL0021
rows.name: Let him sleep and see what happens.

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0004
rows.name:
Mmmm... you can't touch me there-mo.
Being a popular guy is tough-mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0005
rows.name:
Hah! What is this-mo! The flock of
girls suddenly disappeared-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Was it a dream-mo? I fell
asleep before I knew it-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0007
rows.name:
Satsu's special skills are being
able to sleep anywhere and being
super popular with girls-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0008
rows.name:
The popularity is limited to inside my
dreams, but there's no problem-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0009
rows.name:
Everyone is worried because Satsu hasn't
returned-mo? Then I'll head back-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0010
rows.name:
*mumble mumble* Like I said, I'm sorry
but I don't need any more girls-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0011
rows.name:
M-mmmm, hah! What is this-mo! The flock
of girls suddenly disappeared-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0012
rows.name: Who are you-mo? Where is this place-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Was it a dream-mo? I fell
asleep before I knew it-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0014
rows.name:
Satsu's special skills are being
able to sleep anywhere and being
super popular with girls-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0015
rows.name:
The popularity is limited to inside my
dreams, but there's no problem-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0016
rows.name:
Everyone is worried because Satsu hasn't
returned-mo? Then I'll head back-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0017
rows.name:
*mumble mumble*... I'm
back-mo............[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0018
rows.name:
Hm? Is it only Brother Jitsu
here-mo? Where is everyone-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0019
rows.name:
*mumble*... It's a prophetic
dream-mo... Yoyotsu is near
the Seabound Coil Tree...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0020
rows.name: Gotsu is around the Sunlit Spring...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0021
rows.name:
Mumutsu should be in a place near
Decapotamon where you can see the
island clearly...-mo... *mumble mumble*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0022
rows.name:
Yoyotsu! Gotsu! Mumutsu!!! Stop
playing around and line up-mo~~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040402_MSG0023
rows.name:
Even though we promised to say thank
you to [ST:playername ]... I'm going back to sleep-mo![ST:wait ]
